'''badhatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ngardu|ngardu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-dh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ngardu|ngardu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| badhatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bædhæthæth|bædhæthæth]] || [[word:bædhæthæj|bædhæthæj]] || [[word:bædhæthæsh|bædhæthæsh]] || [[word:bædhæthæ|bædhæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:badhadhathath|badhadhathath]] || [[word:badhadhathaj|badhadhathaj]] || [[word:badhadhathash|badhadhathash]] || [[word:badhadhatha|badhadhatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:badhathath|badhathath]] || [[word:badhathaj|badhathaj]] || [[word:badhathash|badhathash]] || [[word:badhatha|badhatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:badhafthath|badhafthath]] || [[word:badhafthaj|badhafthaj]] || [[word:badhafthash|badhafthash]] || [[word:badhafthaf|badhafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:badhathatha|badhathatha]] || [[word:badhathaja|badhathaja]] || [[word:badhathasha|badhathasha]] || [[word:badhathaka|badhathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:badhathath|badhathath]] || [[word:badhathaj|badhathaj]] || [[word:badhathash|badhathash]] || [[word:badhatha|badhatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:badhathathal|badhathathal]] || [[word:badhathajal|badhathajal]] || [[word:badhathashal|badhathashal]] || [[word:badhathakal|badhathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:badhathathatha|badhathathatha]] || [[word:badhathajaja|badhathajaja]] || [[word:badhathashasha|badhathashasha]] || [[word:badhathaka|badhathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:badhathathan|badhathathan]] || [[word:badhathajan|badhathajan]] || [[word:badhathashan|badhathashan]] || [[word:badhathakan|badhathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:badhathathaoro|badhathathaoro]] || [[word:badhathajaoro|badhathajaoro]] || [[word:badhathashaoro|badhathashaoro]] || [[word:badhathakaoro|badhathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
